jsonLd.title: Principal Radiologist at Alkem Laboratories
jsonLd.description:
Alkem Laboratories has an exciting opening for a Radiologist at our Chennai office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Alkem Laboratories:
Alkem Laboratories is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Medical Coding

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Alkem Laboratories!
